titles.title: When I Look into Your Holiness (I Worship You)

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When I look into Your holiness, When I gaze into Your loveliness, When all things that surround, Become shadows in the light of You

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: When I found the joy of reaching Your heart, When my will becomes enthroned in Your love, When all things that surround become shadows in the light of You

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I worship You, I worship You! The reason I live is to worship You. I worship You, I worship You! The reason I live is to worship You.
